title: daemon store: no FK constraints in schema; orphaned rows possible
description: daemon/src/store.rs has no FOREIGN KEY declarations in any table and no PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON. Specific gaps: space_member.space_id does not reference space(id) — deleting a space leaves orphaned members. message.chat_id does not reference chat(id). No cascades or referential integrity exist at the schema level; correctness relies entirely on application-layer deletes never being skipped. Fix: add FOREIGN KEY ... ON DELETE CASCADE to space_member and message tables in a new migration, and enable PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON in DaemonStore::new().
